name: Shrimp Wit Pumpkin Seed Sauce
keywords: fish main dish mexican sauces seafood
recipeIngredient: 1 pickled Jalapeno Pepper, Rinsed and Finely Chopped
1 cup Pumpkin Seeds, Toasted and Coarsely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the shrimp by removing shells and deveining if necessary.
2. Prepare the pickled jalapeno pepper by rinsing, seeding, and finely chopping it.
3. In a bowl, mix flour with enough water to form a paste.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
5. Add minced garlic and onion to the hot oil; sauté until fragrant.
6. Add tomatoes and jalapeno pepper to the pan; cook until tomatoes soften.
7. Stir in coriander seed, salt, chicken bouillon, and sugar.
8. Cook for a few minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
9. Make a roux by mixing flour paste with oil; add it to the pan, stirring constantly.
10. Add lime juice and pumpkin seeds to the sauce; toss gently to combine.
11. Serve hot over cooked rice.
